prompt: Create a premium studio portrait of a footballer (character name) designed entirely around the character’s unique identity, personality, style, and visual theme. Every detail in the image must be customized specifically to match the character, including hairstyle, facial structure, expression, clothing design, team inspiration, color palette, accessories, posture, typography, atmosphere, lighting mood, and background aesthetics. The football jersey must feel fully personalized to the character, inspired by a fictional or real football club that matches their vibe and energy. Include custom team colors, unique crest-style badge, modern sleeve accents, luxury sportswear stitching, sponsor-style graphics, and an authentic oversized football-fashion silhouette. Add the number “[NUMBER]” and position “[POSITION]” designed specifically for the character’s identity and role. The character must remain visually consistent and realistic, preserving all defining features, natural skin texture, pores, proportions, eye shape, nose structure, lips, hairstyle, and facial identity. Avoid artificial beauty filters, over-smoothing, or exaggerated stylization. Use a cinematic monochrome or gradient studio background inspired directly by the character’s theme and team colors. Add premium stadium-style lighting with soft directional highlights from above and one side, creating realistic shadows, depth, and dramatic contrast across the face and jersey. Include subtle football editorial graphics designed around the character’s aesthetic: – thin frame lines – minimal typography blocks – technical labels – custom slogans or match details – faint football pitch markings – geometric overlays or futuristic grid patterns – subtle branding elements matching the character theme Add slight atmospheric haze, soft film grain, floating dust particles, or cinematic glow to create a premium stadium atmosphere while keeping the composition clean and luxury-focused. Pose should reflect the character’s personality naturally: confident, relaxed, intimidating, calm, energetic, mysterious, stylish, or aggressive depending on the character design. Slight body angle, natural hand placement, fashion-editorial posture. Style inspired by high-end Nike, Adidas, Puma, and luxury football campaign photography mixed with cinematic sports-fashion editorials. Depth of field: character in ultra-sharp focus with a softly blurred cinematic background. Ultra-detailed, 8K quality, realistic fabric textures, authentic skin detail, dramatic lighting, polished composition, premium football-fashion campaign aesthetic, cinematic framing, bold and highly shareable.
